gates.description: Meta-audit: reads registry.json, filters to soft-channel gates (manual / pnpm-meta / ci-scheduled), runs each gate against the current tree, and emits a triage report at /tmp/soft-gates-audit.json + docs/guardrails/soft-gate-promotion-plan.md. Classifies each gate as promote-to-pre-commit, promote-to-pre-push, promote-to-ci-pr, baseline-then-promote, investigate-broken, or stay-soft. Runs on demand; never modifies firingChannel values.
TODO: add description — audit-batch-deliverables.mjs JSDoc block is empty.
Generates a bundle composition report at docs/perf/bundle-report.html using vite-bundle-visualizer. Manual channel only — artifact, not gating.
Detects stale claims on docs/ai/orchestration.json units. A claim goes stale when status=claimed and claimedAt is older than the stale-threshold (default 4h).

Merged gate (13z-6): (1) --tokens: token compliance audit for HDS components (hardcoded hex/rgba/opacity/radius/spacing/transition values); (2) --completeness: asserts every shipped component has a rich manifest entry for LLM use; (3) --docs: documentation coverage gate (every component imported in at least one HDS doc page); (4) --api: public API surface guard comparing against docs/api/api-baseline.json. Default: runs all 4. Merged from: audit-components + check-component-completeness + check-component-docs + check-public-api.

Dependency vulnerability audit wrapping pnpm audit --audit-level moderate. Translates each advisory into a registry violation; critical/high are errors, moderate/low are warnings. Manual channel only (network required).
TODO: add description — audit-exceptions.mjs has no leading JSDoc block.
Read-only Figma sync audit for the Hirobius repo. Purpose: compare repo truth against the generated Figma variable exports.

Static purity audit. Scans every registered gate's source for fs writes, Date.now / Math.random, network imports, and process.env access outside an allowlist. Produces docs/guardrails/purity-audit.md. Warn-only by default; --strict exits 1 on any IMPURE-without-exception gate.

Meta-gate ratchet for the --json rollout (per unit 13p-8). For each registered gate outside pnpm-meta, spawns `node <gateScript> --json` with a 30s timeout and verifies stdout parses as { violations: Array }. Reports compliance counters; emits Violation rows for non-compliant gates so they surface in the strict-gate inventory. Severity:warn initially; flip to error once 100% comply.

Token compliance auditor for page surfaces. This is intentionally looser than audit-components.mjs — reusable components must be strict, pages must still avoid raw design values but can keep justified editorial layout.
Generates a CycloneDX Software Bill of Materials at docs/security/sbom.json. Manual channel — produces an artifact, not a gate. Useful for the GRC narrative and supply-chain review.
Verifies that each documented differentiator in docs/architecture/strengths-and-differentiators.md is still real.
Heuristic tier classifier for every src/app/components/Hds*.tsx (and recursive subdirs like src/app/components/lab/). Proposes one of: primitive | pattern | utility | unknown.
Audits CSS token bridges and visual overrides against the JSON token source of truth.

Merged gate (13z-6): (1) prevents raw font family strings in fontFamily style props; (2) verifies @font-face url() paths in fonts.css resolve to real files; (3) enforces fontWeight/textTransform override discipline (single-weight + casing-via-eyebrow policy). Sub-mode flags: --fonts-only, --font-files-only, --overrides-only. Merged from: check-hardcoded-fonts + check-font-files + audit-typography-overrides.

Guards the asset layer before large-scale visual population begins. Checks that every real file in public/assets has a manifest entry and every manifest entry uses normalized paths and valid metadata.
Keeps the attribution registry machine-checkable. Checks that registry IDs in ATTRIBUTIONS.md are present and unique, and that asset manifest sourceId values resolve to known registry IDs.
Soft gate that catches the failure mode where a component starts referencing a component-tier CSS variable that the masters pipeline doesn't know to bind.
Validates that all living documentation files are in sync with the current brand values in hirobius.tokens.json. Exits non-zero if stale values found.
CI check: every Figma component with a Code Connect mapping (.figma.tsx) has a corresponding React component, and vice versa.

WCAG 2.1 contrast ratio checker for HDS semantic color pairs. Reads hirobius.tokens.json, resolves primitive + semantic color aliases, and reports contrast ratios for critical text/bg pairings in both light and dark mode.
Verifies that hand-authored bridge vars in theme.css stay in sync with the token source of truth in hirobius.tokens.json.
Catches raw numeric width/height style values in app component/page files before they reach the broader audit lane. This is the narrow, fast gate for the most common component sizing mistakes.
Validates structural invariants of HDS documentation pages. Checks that foundation pages have DocPageHeader and at least one section.

Unified link integrity gate: (1) active docs do not point at missing local files, (2) external href URLs return non-4xx, (3) internal route targets are known app routes. Merged from check-doc-references, check-external-links, check-route-links (13z-6).
Keeps escape hatches visible and well-formed. Checks that only known exemption markers are used and every exemption marker includes a non-empty reason after the colon.

B-class monotonic-decrement ratchet: asserts the withStubFixtures count from validate-fixture-proof-of-firing never increases. Any regression (new stub fixture added) fails the PR. Burn down by replacing stubs with real fixtures.
A11y focus state checker for HDS components and pages. Every interactive element must have a visible focus indicator.
Guardrail for docs preview surfaces. Consumer component docs pages should not hand-author bespoke preview demos; those previews must stay default-state renders.
Catches raw pixel comparisons against known breakpoint values in JS/TS. All JS/TS viewport comparisons must use hds.breakpoints.* — no raw px numbers that match a known breakpoint value.
Catches hardcoded color values in non-CSS color contexts that bypass the CSS custom property cascade and are invisible to check-inline-styles / check-tier-bypass.
Scans all TSX/TS component files for raw pixel values in style props that should use hds.space.*, hds.density.*, or var(--hds-space-*) instead.

Merged gate (13z-6): (1) catches plain HTML elements with 6+ inline style properties; (2) catches suspicious style prop values (function/string references); (3) catches raw color literals in hand-authored CSS files. Sub-mode flags: --inline-only, --style-props-only, --css-values-only. Merged from: check-inline-styles + check-style-prop-values + check-css-values.
Flags direct use of legacy --hds-text, --hds-dim, and --hds-subtle CSS custom properties in component and page source files. These vars have been renamed to the semantic text tier.
License compliance gate. Runs pnpm licenses list --prod and blocks copyleft/restrictive licenses (GPL/AGPL/LGPL/SSPL/BUSL/EUPL/OSL/CC-BY-NC/CDDL).
TODO: add description — check-manifest-drift.mjs has no leading JSDoc block.
Compares the current manifest/schema.json against manifest/schema.lock.json and flags breaking changes (property removals, type tightenings) as semver violations.
Prevents ornamental/raw monospace from creeping back into prose-heavy surfaces that should rely on InlineCode or normal body/caption styling instead.
Verifies that interactive components ship with motion feedback — the HDS standard that every user action has a visible, token-timed response.
Static analysis validator for OG meta tags in index.html. This project is a React Router SPA with a single index.html (no per-route meta tags).
gates.wiringTodo: should be ci-pr or ci-scheduled — not yet wired into a workflow that actually triggers it

gates.description: Forbids direct Container usage in src/app/pages/**. Pages must use Page (which wraps Container + applies the canonical vertical padding) so every page receives consistent layout.
Verifies that the HDS motion system respects prefers-reduced-motion at both layers: CSS transitions and Motion (Framer Motion) animations.
Verifies that HDS components rendering native form controls forward their ref to the underlying DOM element.
Validates that hds-registry.json is complete and up-to-date. Checks that there are no stub summaries and no page files are missing a registry entry.
Route coverage gate — every routable page must appear in the layout-integrity test set.
Runtime route smoke test for key portfolio and HDS routes. Uses the built app plus vite preview so route validation goes beyond static strings.
gates.wiringTodo: should be ci-pr or ci-scheduled — not yet wired into a workflow that actually triggers it

gates.description: Pre-commit secrets scanner wrapping the gitleaks binary. Registers gitleaks in the guardrail registry so it shows up in audits and fixture-proof runs.
Local security and dependency hygiene baseline. Checks that no committed runtime env files, npm credentials, obvious secrets, external font/CDN imports, or dangerous HTML injection exist in source.
Source-side companion to validators/swiss-canon.mjs. The JSX validator runs on LLM-generated output; this scanner runs on hand-authored .tsx files.
Prevents direct edits to auto-generated output files by checking that if an output file has been modified, the corresponding generator script is also modified.
Validates every tenants/<slug>/tokens.json against HDS structural rules. Runs as a standalone CLI tool and as a pre-commit gate.
Enforces the primitive -> semantic -> component aliasing hierarchy in source files. Direct use of var(--primitive-*) in component and page files bypasses the semantic tier.

Merged gate (13z-6): default mode enforces token description quality in hirobius.tokens.json (missing/blank/verbose descriptions). With --quality flag: also scans generated-token-descriptions.ts for empty, generic-fallback, or one-sided-theme-language descriptions. Merged from: check-token-descriptions + check-token-description-quality.

Merged gate (13z-6): default mode scans src/** for unresolved design-token path references ({primitive,semantic,component,role}.x.y.z) against hirobius.tokens.json — fires pre-commit. With --ratchet flag: B-class monotonic-decrement ratchet asserting .token-path-baseline.txt entry count never increases — fires ci-pr. Use --update-baseline to record a new baseline. Merged from: check-token-paths (scan) + check-token-paths-ratchet (count ratchet).
Pre-commit guard: ensure generated token outputs are in sync with hirobius.tokens.json. A commit that edits the source but skips the rebake silently ships stale tokens.

Compares the current hirobius.tokens.json leaf paths against the committed baseline in tokens.lock.json. Any path present in the baseline but missing from current is a rename/deletion that needs a migration.
Validates hirobius.tokens.json for structural correctness. Catches cross-tier aliasing and theme coverage gaps.

Pre-dispatch unit-overlap detector. Given a unit ID about to be claimed, reads its agentNotes and description for likely file paths and refuses to claim if another in-flight (status: claimed) unit is also touching those paths. Hooked into hermes-unit.mjs claim flow. Mitigates the parallel-pod anti-pattern where two agents race to edit the same file.
Catches static multi-column gridTemplateColumns values with no nearby isMobile guard. Every multi-column grid must be responsive.
Meta-validator: every gate registered in docs/guardrails/registry.json has a firingChannel that matches actual invocation. Catches aspirational guardrails — gates registered but never really firing.

Validates that commits on feature branches reference an open Hermes Kanban task via 'Refs: <task-id>' line in the commit body. Wired in .husky/commit-msg. Warn-only by default; promote with KANBAN_REF_ENFORCE=error. Skips main/release/*/hotfix/*, [skip-kanban] tag, merge/revert commits. Accepts kanban IDs (t_<hex>) and legacy unit IDs (1[0-9][a-z]-<n>).

Scans every branch ahead of main and classifies each commit as tracked/orphan based on whether it has a 'Refs: <task-id>' line that points to an open Hermes Kanban task. Companion to check-commit-message-task-ref (which catches new orphans pre-commit); this catches the existing backlog. Always exits 0 — purely informational. Run via 'pnpm audit:wip'. Writes docs/guardrails/orphan-wip-report.json.

Pure observer that reads registry.json, orchestration.json, swarm-watchdog-decisions.jsonl, tsconfig.json, and component-api.json. Computes Score A (Internal Integrity, 6 dims) + Score B (Industry Benchmark, 8 dims) per the 13s-strength-1 ADR. Emits docs/guardrails/strength-report.md and strength-report.json. Idempotent (same input → byte-identical output modulo timestamp). Fast (<2s). No mutations to source files.

Meta-validator: walks registry.json and asserts every registered gate has a fixture pair (violating + passing). Stub fixtures warn; missing fixtures error; real fixtures run the gate and assert correct exit codes. mtime-scoped for fast pre-commit runs.
Validates docs/ai/orchestration.json schema. In strict mode (--strict-validation), additionally asserts all approved units have a valid validationCmd. Pre-commit MUST invoke the strict form.

Planning artifact: reads registry.json and produces a per-gate replaceability verdict (fully-replaceable / partially-replaceable / genuinely-custom) with industry-tool replacements and migration cost estimates. Output: /tmp/gate-replaceability-audit.json + docs/guardrails/gate-replaceability-plan.md. Manual channel only — run on demand when evaluating gate rationalization.

Warns when a committed snapshot baseline JSON is older than any of its source files — catching baselines that should have been regenerated after a source change but weren't. Covers fixtures/figma-masters/snapshot-pre-8v3.json (sources: pipeline/figma-masters-batch.mjs + public/hds-manifest.json) and fixtures/doc-pages/snapshot.json (sources: src/app/pages/docs/**/*.tsx). Warn-only by default; set STALENESS_ENFORCE=error to make blocking.
